name: cameratracking-v2
description: 基于 uni-app x 的 H5 双手追踪项目

scripts.dev:h5: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {spawn}=require('node:child_process'); const root=process.cwd(); const cli=path.join(root,'node_modules','@dcloudio','vite-plugin-uni','bin','uni.js'); const child=spawn(process.execPath,[cli],{cwd:root,env:{...process.env,UNI_INPUT_DIR:root,VITE_ROOT_DIR:root},stdio:'inherit',shell:false}); child.on('error',err=>{console.error(err&&err.message?err.message:err); process.exit(1);}); child.on('exit',code=>process.exit(code||0));"
scripts.build:h5: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {spawn}=require('node:child_process'); const root=process.cwd(); const cli=path.join(root,'node_modules','@dcloudio','vite-plugin-uni','bin','uni.js'); const child=spawn(process.execPath,[cli,'build'],{cwd:root,env:{...process.env,UNI_INPUT_DIR:root,VITE_ROOT_DIR:root},stdio:'inherit',shell:false}); child.on('error',err=>{console.error(err&&err.message?err.message:err); process.exit(1);}); child.on('exit',code=>process.exit(code||0));"
